name: customer-review-analyst
description: Analyzes customer reviews for any product and produces a rich, interactive HTML dashboard, PowerPoint slides, and PDF report.

plugins.name: customer-review-analyst
plugins.description: Fetches, analyzes, and visualizes customer reviews into a polished dark-theme interactive dashboard with Chart.js charts, complaint themes, verbatim quotes, and prioritized action items. Supports HTML, PPTX, and PDF output.
